name: PagerDuty
description: Trigger, acknowledge, and resolve incidents in PagerDuty
author: awaitstep

incidentId.label: Incident ID
incidentId.description: Incident ID. Used by: Acknowledge Incident, Resolve Incident.

title.label: Title
title.description: Incident title. Used by: Trigger Incident.

description.label: Description
description.description: Incident description. Used by: Trigger Incident.

severity.label: Severity
severity.description: Severity level. Used by: Trigger Incident.

serviceId.label: Service ID
serviceId.description: Service ID. Used by: Trigger Incident.

routingKey.label: Routing Key
routingKey.description: Events API routing key. Used by: Trigger Incident.

userEmail.label: User Email
userEmail.description: Email of user performing action. Used by: Acknowledge Incident, Resolve Incident.
